blurb: Chopper Mountain offers unique boutique lodging, crafting unforgettable mountain escapes that blend adventure with serene comfort. We provide a distinct retreat designed to elevate your getaway into a cherished memory.

story.title: Chopper Mountain's Story
paragraphs: Chopper Mountain began as a passion project, a dream to create a unique mountain escape where natural beauty and genuine comfort perfectly meet. We envisioned a place where guests could truly unwind, recharge, and connect with the stunning landscape that surrounds us. Every detail, from the cozy rooms to the warm hospitality, has been thoughtfully curated to ensure your stay is as memorable and refreshing as the crisp mountain air itself. Come discover the peaceful haven we've built, and let the spirit of Chopper Mountain welcome you home.
I broke my leg at CM and all i got was an STD.

testimonials.quote: "Came for the choppers, stayed because my phone died on day one and nobody could give me directions out. Best week of my life. The hot tub takes three hours to heat up and I've never been more patient. 10/10, will lose service again."
testimonials.author: Dave R.

testimonials.quote: "My wife said I needed to 'unplug.' So I drove four hours into the mountains, chopped wood for a hot tub like some kind of frontier idiot, and had the best time of my life. She keeps asking when I'm coming home. I keep saying the Wi-Fi's too slow to text back."
testimonials.author: Marty T.

rooms.name: Cozy Romantical Candy Canes
rooms.blurb: The Cozy Romantical Candy Canes room offers a sweet escape for two on a king bed, all for just $75.

amenities.label: Wood Burning Hot Tub
amenities.description: Soak in a wood-fired hot tub under a mountain sky — heat by fire, cooled by the stars.

amenities.label: Low Speed Wi-Fi
amenities.description: Wi-Fi so slow, you'll finish your beer before the page loads
